nodes.label: Comparative IoT Technology Evaluation for Indoor Localization (WiFi/BLE/ZigBee/LoRaWAN)
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. RSSI-Based Indoor Localization With the Internet of Things : IEEE Access, 2018.pdf
nodes.rationale: Comparing WiFi, BLE, ZigBee and LoRaWAN on RSSI trilateration under same conditions provides empirical guidance for technology selection based on accuracy vs power consumption trade-offs.
